title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A Google DeepMind retrospective marking 10 years since AlphaGo defeated Lee Sedol at Go in 2016. The video features Pushmeet Kohli and Thore Graepel discussing how this reinforcement learning breakthrough sparked the modern AI revolution and laid foundations for later advances like protein folding solutions.
